name: Unpossible Ralphathon
description: Ralphthon @SF ✅ Hack Guide: https://ralphthon.team-attention.com/guide If you want to touch your laptop, you put on a lobster costume first. 🦞 While your AI agent codes, you meet the builders who are shaping what comes next. This isn't just a hackathon. It's your entry point into a top-tier network of agent-native engineers
speakers: Geoffrey Huntley: Creator of Ralph Loop
Romain Huet: Head of Developer Experience @OpenAI, working on Codex
Mo Tiwari : ex @OpenAI, Stanford CS PhD
Jaegyu Lee: Winner of 1st Ralphthon, Maintainer of ouroboros
judges: Yeachan Heo (bellman) — Maintainer of oh-my-claude-code(11K ⭐) & oh-my-codex
Yujong Lee - Co Founder of char.com YC S25 (8K ⭐)
John Jeong - CEO of char.com YC S25 (8K ⭐)
Chanhee Lee - Co Founder of Aside, YC F25
CJ Na - Co Founder & CTO of Carvis, ex) Cruise
Jay Warida - Co Founder & CEO of Carvis
Mantra Patel - Engineer at Stack Auth (YC S24)
Sheshansh Agrawal - Research Lead @ Contextual AI
George Zhang - Maintainer of OpenClaw & Pi
Austin Wang - Founder & CEO, Manaflow (YC S24) & cmux.com (11k stars)
